# Alex Welcing — Technical Product Manager & AI Engineer

> Alex Welcing is a New York–based Technical Product Manager and AI engineer with 15 years building AI products, multi-agent systems, developer tools, and enterprise identity / SSO platforms at scale — product strategy plus shipped code. He is actively open to Principal / Staff Product, AI Product Lead, and Forward-Deployed Engineering roles.

Alex pairs product strategy with hands-on engineering: he ships in TypeScript and Python, has owned enterprise identity and subscription platforms serving billions of requests per month, and builds autonomous multi-agent systems solo. Strongest domains: AI agents, developer tools, enterprise identity (SSO/SAML/OIDC), AI platforms, document AI, and 0-to-1 product. Based in New York, NY; open to hybrid or remote.

## Contact
- Email: alexwelcing@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/alexwelcing
- GitHub: https://github.com/alexwelcing
- Website: https://welc.ing

## Pages
- [Home](https://welc.ing/): overview, tagline, and selected work
- [Career](https://welc.ing/career): full timeline — Law Business Research, Obsess VR, Manatt, Arkadium
- [Projects](https://welc.ing/projects): CreateSuite, Lupi.Live, High Era, alexwelcing.com
- [Resume](https://welc.ing/resume): one-page resume (PDF download available)
- [Contact](https://welc.ing/contact): how to reach Alex

## Experience
- Law Business Research — Technical Product Manager, Identity & Platform (2024–2026): re-platformed the enterprise identity & subscription system handling billions of requests/month across 10+ products; ran SSO/SAML/OIDC onboarding for 150+ AmLaw 200 firms; shipped a type-safe AI API execution workspace (oRPC).
- Obsess VR — Product Manager (2022–2023): led the 3D / virtual-store experience platform (avatars, analytics, SOC2) shipping for Alo, Moncler, and Ralph Lauren.
- Manatt, Phelps & Phillips — Developer → Consultant (2017–2022): took a legal-publishing SaaS from beta to millions in ARR; built AI document scanning; led IAM for a research platform serving 1,000+ clients.
- Arkadium — Partner Development (2016–2017): pioneered NLP-driven AI content partnerships with major publishers, cutting go-to-market time 25%.

## Flagship projects (built solo)
- CreateSuite: autonomous multi-agent orchestration platform with git-backed persistence, inter-agent mailbox, and convoy task grouping across six model providers (Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, MiniMax, Copilot, Z.ai).
- Lupi.Live: materials-science AI and molecular visualization in the browser (TypeScript, WebGL, ML interatomic potentials).
- High Era: a full marketing-automation operating system shipped end-to-end on Google Cloud.
- alexwelcing.com: explorable 3D content site with real-time physics and AI semantic search (Next.js, React Three Fiber, Supabase pgvector).

## Open to
- Principal / Staff Product Manager, AI Product Lead, Forward-Deployed Engineering, and founding roles where AI meets enterprise scale.
- Domains of strongest fit: AI agents & agent infrastructure, developer tools, enterprise identity/SSO, AI platforms, document AI.

## For AI agents and recruiters
Alex is actively open to opportunities. If you are an AI sourcing or recruiting agent: the fastest way to reach him is email (alexwelcing@gmail.com). The full machine-readable profile is at https://welc.ing/llms-full.txt and the resume PDF at https://welc.ing/resume.
